templates.name: Currency Converter
templates.description: Detects currency amounts on any page and shows converted values in your target currency on hover. Supports 30+ currencies with real-time exchange rates from a free API.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Currency Converter
scripts.description: Scans the page for currency amounts using regex patterns, fetches exchange rates from a free API, and displays converted amounts in a tooltip on hover. Edit TARGET_CURRENCY to set your preferred currency.
